text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm Fine Motion. And it's a fine pleasure to meet
you, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What I'm hoping for... is to make a grand heap of
wonderful memories with everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm to race with all I've got! It'd be just
smashing if we could make these next three years
together a time to remember!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
